query: SELECT id, title, status, JSON_EXTRACT(analysis_results, '$.suggestions[0].frameTimestampSec') as first_frame_sec, JSON_EXTRACT(analysis_results, '$.suggestions[0].frameTimestamp') as first_frame_ts FROM video_analyses ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
